requirement_topic.en: UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 Transport Safety — Mandatory for Lithium Battery Sea Freight to Pohnpei and Inter-Island Distribution
requirement_topic.zh: UN 38.3与IEC 62281运输安全——运往波奈佩及内岛分拨的锂电池海运强制要求
requirement_topic.zht: UN 38.3與IEC 62281運輸安全——運往波奈佩及內島分發的鋰電池海運強制要求

summary.en: UN 38.3 specifies the mandatory lithium battery transport test sequence (T1–T8) and is required for dangerous-goods sea transport evidence. For FSM, the practical entry point for most BESS cargo remains Pohnpei, with onward inter-island transfers to outer islands by secondary vessels. The requirement set is not different from IMDG practice, but project owners in FSM must confirm the local documentation set used for customs pre-clearance, port handling, and state utility delivery sequencing. IEC 62281 remains a complementary reference where project teams require additional transport controls.
summary.zh: UN 38.3规定了锂电池运输的强制试验序列（T1至T8），并且是危险货物海运证据要求。对FSM而言，大多数BESS货物仍以波奈佩为主要进口口岸，再通过岛内转运船到外岛。该要求与IMDG规则一致，但FSM项目方必须确认用于海关预清关、港口作业和州公用事业交付流程的地方文件清单。IEC 62281依然可作为补充参考，在项目团队要求更多运输控制时使用。
summary.zht: UN 38.3規定了鋰電池運輸的強制測試序列（T1至T8），並且是危險貨物海運證據要求。對FSM而言，多數BESS貨物仍以波奈佩為主要進口口岸，再透過島內轉運船到外島。該要求與IMDG規則一致，但FSM項目方必須確認用於海關預清關、港口作業及州公共事業交付流程的地方文件清單。IEC 62281仍可作為補充參考，在項目團隊要求更多運輸控制時使用。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 — Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods, Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 (mandatory transport safety tests T1–T8 and test-summary requirements)
IEC 62281:2019 — Safety of Primary and Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries during Transport (supplementary transport safety standard)
IMDG Code — International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code (applies to lithium battery sea freight to FSM)
SOLAS — International Convention for the Safety of Life at Sea
FSM customs and port handling process through Pohnpei and onward inter-island cargo operators

summary.en: China export supply chains generally maintain UN 38.3 test reports and test summaries from accredited laboratories. That baseline is still useful for FSM sea freight, but FSM-facing review requires evidence coverage for the exact cell model and any revised pack design used for shipment.
summary.zh: 中国出口链条通常会由认可实验室维护UN 38.3测试报告和测试摘要。该基线对FSM海运仍有帮助，但FSM端审查仍要求覆盖具体电芯型号及用于装运的任何修改后电池组设计。
summary.zht: 中國出口鏈條通常會由認可實驗室維護UN 38.3測試報告和測試摘要。該基線對FSM海運仍有幫助，但FSM端審查仍要求覆蓋具體電芯型號及用於裝運的任何修改後電池組設計。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test reports and test summaries from China-accredited laboratories (applicable if the test summary covers the exact battery model being exported)
UN-registered dangerous-goods documentation used for port and customs transfer

gap.en: The gap is not standard direction but scope and routing verification: Chinese export teams must keep test documentation tied to the exact exported design and ensure that Pohnpei entry logistics, onward inter-island handling, and potential US transit points do not introduce extra dangerous-goods requirements. A wrong-cell-model summary is the common failure mode. FSM is island-distributed, so dimensional constraints for secondary barge or feeder vessels can also create practical compliance blockers.
gap.zh: 差距不在标准方向，而在范围与物流路径核实：中国出口团队必须保证测试文件与实际出口设计完全一致，并确认波奈佩入境、外岛转运及可能的美国中转点是否带来额外危险品要求。错误的电芯型号测试摘要是常见失误。FSM为群岛分散格局，二级驳船或分拨船舶的尺寸限制也会造成实际合规阻滞。
gap.zht: 差距不在標準方向，而在範圍與物流路徑核實：中國出口團隊必須確保測試文件與實際出口設計完全一致，並確認波奈佩入境、外島轉運及可能的美國中轉點是否帶來額外危險品要求。錯誤的電芯型號測試摘要是常見失誤。FSM為群島分散格局，二級駁船或分撥船舶之尺寸限制亦可能造成實際合規阻塞。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory under international dangerous-goods transport law for all lithium battery sea freight used in FSM projects
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under international transport convention for lithium exports from China

source.publisher: Department of Resources and Development (DRD), Federated States of Micronesia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 compliance remains universal for lithium shipments. For FSM-bound projects, verify the exact exported cell model, route, and Pohnpei inter-island transfer constraints before shipment; retain a shipping agent familiar with both IMDG Code and FSM customs handling.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3与IEC 62281对锂电池运输具有普遍约束。面向FSM的项目应在发运前核实具体出口电芯型号、航线与波奈佩内外岛转运限制；保留熟悉IMDG规则及FSM海关流程的运输代理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3與IEC 62281對鋰電池運輸具有普遍約束。面向FSM之項目應於發運前核實具體出口電芯型號、航線與波奈佩內外島轉運限制；保留熟悉IMDG規則及FSM海關流程的運輸代理。
